7750 def _url_targets_local_or_meta(parsed_url, allow_loopback=True):
7751     """Return True if the URL resolves to a host class an SSRF attacker
7752     would exploit: link-local (covers AWS/GCP/Azure metadata services at
7753     169.254.169.254), unspecified (0.0.0.0), and — when allow_loopback
7754     is False — loopback (127.0.0.0/8, ::1).
7755 
7756     RFC1918 private networks are deliberately allowed since RemotePower
7757     targets the LAN by design.
7758 
7759     v3.3.0 C3: loopback used to be unconditionally blocked, which broke
7760     the legitimate ntfy / gotify / dev-instance use case. Now controlled
7761     by allow_loopback so the safer default (block cloud metadata) ships
7762     on by default while operators running a sidecar notifier on
7763     127.0.0.1 keep working.
7764 
7765     Resolves the hostname via socket.getaddrinfo; on resolve failure
7766     returns False (don't block what we can't classify — handler will
7767     fail later with a network error).
7768     """
7769     import socket
7770     host = parsed_url.hostname or ''
7771     if not host:
7772         return True   # No host at all — block to be safe
7773     try:
7774         addrs = socket.getaddrinfo(host, None)
7775     except socket.gaierror:
7776         return False  # Can't resolve — let the request through, will fail anyway
7777     for _family, _t, _p, _c, sockaddr in addrs:
7778         try:
7779             if _ip_class_blocked(sockaddr[0], allow_loopback):
7780                 return True
7781         except (ValueError, IndexError):
7782             continue
7783     return False

7786 def _ip_class_blocked(ip_str, allow_loopback=True):
7787     """Per-IP SSRF classifier shared by the pre-flight DNS check and the
7788     connect-time peer recheck. Returns True for the host classes an SSRF
7789     attacker would target: link-local (covers 169.254.169.254 cloud
7790     metadata), unspecified (0.0.0.0), multicast and reserved, and — when
7791     allow_loopback is False — loopback. RFC1918 private ranges are allowed
7792     by design (LAN fleet)."""
7793     import ipaddress
7794     ip = ipaddress.ip_address(ip_str)
7795     # Unwrap IPv6 forms that embed an IPv4 address and re-classify the inner
7796     # v4 — otherwise a v4 metadata/loopback target can be smuggled past the
7797     # v6 checks: v4-mapped (::ffff:a.b.c.d), 6to4 (2002::/16), and the NAT64
7798     # well-known prefix (64:ff9b::/96 wrapping 169.254.169.254).
7799     if isinstance(ip, ipaddress.IPv6Address):
7800         inner = ip.ipv4_mapped or ip.sixtofour
7801         if inner is None and (int(ip) >> 32) == (0x0064ff9b << 64):
7802             inner = ipaddress.IPv4Address(int(ip) & 0xffffffff)
7803         if inner is not None:
7804             ip = inner
7805     # Decide loopback first: ::1 is also is_reserved, so the reserved check
7806     # below would otherwise block a loopback target even when allowed.
7807     if ip.is_loopback:
7808         return not allow_loopback
7809     if (ip.is_link_local or ip.is_unspecified
7810             or ip.is_multicast or ip.is_reserved):
7811         return True
7812     return False
